title: Spicy American-Style Skillet Steak
description: A flavorful and spicy steak dish cooked to perfection in a skillet, inspired by American cuisine. This recipe combines the bold flavors of ancho chillies with the richness of a dense cut of American steak.

ingredients.name: 1.5-2 pounds American steak (such as ribeye or strip loin)
2 ancho chillies
ingredients.notes: rehydrated in hot water or broth

instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium-high heat (400°F/200°C).
Season the steak with salt, black pepper, and smoked paprika.
Add the oil to the skillet and sear the steak for 3-4 minutes per side, or until browned.
Remove the steak from the skillet and set aside to rest.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the rehydrated ancho chillies to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the brown sugar to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until dissolved.
Return the steak to the skillet and spoon the ancho chillie sauce over the top.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the steak reaches your desired level of doneness.
Let the steak rest for 5-10 minutes before slicing and serving.
